name: ainpc
description: AI 配置与 NPC 管理（前后端一体开发）

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.build: concurrently -n backend,frontend "npm run build --prefix backend" "npm run build --prefix frontend"
scripts.install-all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
